{{Quote|You ever run a job out to Zekulae, at the heart of the Zeemacht Cluster, lift your eyes from the comm for a minute. You'll be staring up at a matrix of bright orange and red giants, neutron stars, pulsars, and blue stragglers the Zeku call the Cosm's Well. It's about the most beautiful thing I've ever seen that I couldn't buy or sell, and that's saying something.|[[Crix Q5 Baobab]]|<ref name="TEA" />}}
'''Zekulae''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located at the heart of the [[Zeemacht Cluster/Legends|Zeemacht Cluster]] within the [[Zekulae system/Legends|Zekulae system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was a barren world, noted for its dark, rich mineral soil, which was studded with [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]]. Its soil was extremely fine and so was everpresent on the planet. Its inhabitants were known as the [[Zeku]].<ref name="DOH" /> It sat outside the [[Star cluster/Legends|globular cluster]] known as [[Cosm's Well/Legends|Cosm's Well]].<ref name="TEA" />
